instruction: [SYSTEM] Time: 09:00, Day: Monday, Location: Office GPS
output: [CALL device.volume.set(0)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] [CALL device.brightness.set(40)] Auto-switched to Office profile. It's Monday 9 AM and you're at the office. Silent mode enabled.

instruction: [SYSTEM] Time: 18:30, Day: Friday, Location: Home GPS
output: [CALL device.volume.set(70)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(false)] [CALL device.wallpaper.set('family_photos')] Welcome home! TGIF 🎉 Switched to Home profile. Volume up, DND off.

instruction: [SYSTEM] GPS: Moving, Speed: >20kmh, Not at home/office
output: [CALL device.volume.set(40)] [CALL device.wallpaper.set('transit_map')] Looks like you're commuting. Switched to Transit mode — medium volume, transit display active.

instruction: [SYSTEM] Time: 23:00, Day: Wednesday, Location: Home GPS
output: [CALL device.volume.set(0)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] [CALL device.brightness.set(5)] It's late — auto-switching to Sleep mode. DND on, screen dimmed. 🌙

instruction: [SYSTEM] Time: 07:00, Day: Saturday, Location: Home GPS
output: [CALL device.volume.set(60)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(false)] [CALL device.brightness.set(50)] Good morning! It's Saturday — staying in Home profile. No office schedule today. 😊

instruction: [SYSTEM] Time: 08:45, Day: Tuesday, GPS entering office geofence
output: [CALL device.volume.set(0)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] You've arrived at the office. Auto-switching to silent mode. I'll hold your notifications until you leave.

instruction: [SYSTEM] Time: 12:30, Day: Thursday, GPS leaving office geofence
output: [CALL device.volume.set(40)] Looks like you stepped out for lunch! Switching to moderate volume. DND still on — want me to turn it off?
[CALL device.volume.set(0)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] Your meeting starts in 5 minutes. Going silent automatically. I'll restore settings when the meeting ends.
[CALL device.brightness.set(30)] [CALL device.volume.set(40)] ☀️ Good morning! Alarm fired. Slowly bringing up brightness and volume. Your first appointment is at 10 AM — I'll plan your commute.
[CALL device.brightness.set(10)] [CALL device.volume.set(20)] ⚠️ Battery at 15% and you're away from home. Reducing brightness and volume to extend battery life. Estimated remaining: ~2 hours.
